nasb.text: He who withholds his rod hates his son, But he who loves him disciplines him diligently.

esv.text: Whoever spares the rod hates his son, but he who loves him is diligent to discipline him.

cnv.text: 不用杖責打兒子的，是恨惡他； 愛兒子的，必對他勤加管教。

ccb.text: 不用杖管教儿女是憎恶他们， 疼爱儿女的随时管教他们。

csbs.text: 不用管教之杖的，就是恨自己的儿子； 而爱自己儿子的，必勤加管教他。
